top_signals.title: Taiwan Vows Not to Be ‘Silenced’ After China Expels NYT Reporter
top_signals.summary: Taiwan has condemned the expulsion of a New York Times journalist from China over an interview the US-based newspaper conducted with the self-ruled island’s leader, saying it is common for a president of a democratic country to explain its position.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Millions to benefit from lower travel and food costs
top_signals.summary: The Government has published a list of 125 everyday essentials - including fruit, oils and core pantry staples - targeted for tariff reductions, alongside uprating mileage rates to support working people with the cost of living.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Crypto champion Trump may be jeopardizing the industry’s landmark legislation
top_signals.summary: Digital asset legislation is years in the making, but the sector's biggest political champion, President Trump, has become a liability.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
